Professional Experience
Jun 2021 — Present
Ethio IQ
Addis Ababa
Current
Chief Executive Officer
  • Designed and executed a strategic scaling roadmap that digitalized educational services for 11,820 users, managing a cross-functional team of diverse domain experts.
  • Secured critical development grants and forged high-level strategic partnerships with the Mastercard Foundation, Trevor Noah Foundation, Ethiopian Airlines, and Kenyatta University.
  • Transitioned Ethio IQ from a grant-reliant entity to a fully sustainable business model by designing commercialized services that diversified revenue streams and accelerated long-term self-sufficiency.
  • Oversaw design, implementation, and monitoring of program timelines, milestones, and deliverables; collected and analyzed socio-economic data to evaluate performance outcomes.

Lesan AI
Berlin (Remote)
Past
Project Manager
  • Led a 200+ member cross-functional team to build, validate, and deploy a fully functional Machine Translation system, managing end-to-end dataset curation and workflows to commercialize regional language models.
  • Served as primary strategic liaison with global actors including Meta (Facebook), driving high-impact collaborations to scale regional program visibility and technical synergy.
  • Co-authored published research articles turning complex socio-linguistic research into commercialized, high-quality AI products.
  • Directed the full lifecycle of a cutting-edge ASR system, establishing data collection guidelines and model training milestones to achieve target speech-to-text accuracy rates.
  • Optimized cross-departmental resource allocation and risk management frameworks, accelerating project delivery by aligning engineering goals with linguistic curation metrics.
